productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Speedtrek Navy Blue Sports Shoes
description: Love running in the great outdoors?  Need a shoe which can keep your feet firmly on track whatever the terrain?  These Speedtrek shoes from adidas have been engineered with traxion lugs on the outsole to ensure you won't slip on rough or muddy paths, and adiPrene in the midsole which takes charge of dispersing the shock of impact when you're running at speed. In tones of blue with silver highlights and discrete branding, these are on the classy side of the Sports shoe spectrum!UpperMesh upper with synthetic leather overlays to give structure and support your footDiscrete lace-up system for a stylish lookHaul loops on heel and tonguePadded, mesh collar and tongue for comfortFirm insoleMidsoleAdiPrene in the midsole which gives cushioning and support as well as absorbing shock impact when your foot hits the groundOutsoleHardwearing outsole with traxion lugs for running on rough terrainSpeedgrip system for optimun control whatever your speedShoe careUse a moist cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not clean the shoe in a washing machine
